conclusion.title: Verification of Bulk Superconductivity via Magnetic Response

conclusion: The Tl–Ca/Ba–Cu–O samples display strong diamagnetic repulsion indicative of bulk superconductivity, demonstrated by the levitation of a sample with nominal composition $Tl_{2}Ca_{2}BaCu_{3}O_{9+x}$ over a $\sim 5,000$ G magnetic field and confirmed by AC susceptibility measurements.
